Table of Contents

Enum esriRasterCatalogType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

The types of raster catalogs that can be associated with a mosaic datset.

[Guid("A68D64B4-D9F2-4B00-98C1-49405184BAB3")]
public enum esriRasterCatalogType

Fields

esriRasterCatalogTypeImageService = 2

2: An Image Service raster catalog with special fields, e.g. 'MinPS', 'MaxPS', and etc.

esriRasterCatalogTypeMilitaryAnalyst = 1

1: A Military Analyst raster catalog with special fields, e.g. 'SCALE', and etc.

esriRasterCatalogTypeRegular = 0

0: Any regular raster catalog without any special fields.
